description: Style NoteThe ralph lauren Big Pony 4 for men comes in a fancy orange flacon with a polo player graphic on it, epitomizing the hard-wearing cool of the sport. Recommended for casual wear.Product DetailsA stylish, woody and fruity fragrance with base notes of mandarin and kayarawood.CautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyesSize125 ml
